name: DDI-CDI Logical Record Repository
abstract: A managed collection of logical records (delimited file, fixed-record-length file, relational database, etc.). Successor to the DDI-CDI 1.0 DataStore class, renamed and relocated to the FormatDescription package in the 2026-03 DDI-CDI model. Provides $defs for LogicalRecordRepositoryStructure (topology), LogicalRecordRelationship (cross-record linkage, successor to RecordRelation), and InstanceVariableMap. Composes building block: ddicdiLogicalRecord, ddicdiDataTypes (ddiProperties); cdifInstanceVariable (cdifProperties).
